title: Delete legacy v1.x scaffolding (rules/ + INITIAL_TAXONOMY.md + bootstrap/)
description: Hard-delete v1.x knowledge surface from the Fabric self-repo to clear the slate for v2.0. Per user clean-slate preference, NO archive directory (.fabric-v1-archive/) is created. Also remove dead bootstrap templates (GEMINI.md, roo-fabric.md, windsurf-fabric.md) for unsupported clients per MEMORY.md. This task is data-only (file removal); does not touch any code path. Independent of all other rc.1 tasks — can run first or in parallel with TASK-002.

files.change: rm -rf entire directory; current production knowledge surface (empty or near-empty in self-repo per docs/RULE_REGISTRY.md). No git mv, no archive.
rm; v1.x structural L0/L1/L2 topology document. Will be replaced by docs/knowledge-types.md in rc.4 (NOT in this rc).
rm -rf; v1.x bootstrap README produced by buildInitFabricPlan. v2.0 init flow (TASK-008) does not generate this.
rm; dead template for unsupported client (per MEMORY.md fabric supported clients = Claude Code/Cursor/Codex CLI only).
rm; dead template for unsupported client (Roo Code).
rm; dead template for unsupported client (Windsurf).

implementation: Verify .fabric/ now contains only events.jsonl + agents.meta.json + forensic.json (legacy state files; agents.meta.json will be rewritten by TASK-003/TASK-008 with new shape)

Run `pnpm typecheck` to confirm no code paths reference deleted files (init.ts buildInitialTaxonomyMarkdown call sites must still compile — those become callable-but-unused until TASK-008 removes the function)
Stage commit with message 'chore(v2): delete v1.x rules/INITIAL_TAXONOMY/bootstrap scaffolding (clean slate)'

reference.examples: Use `git rm -r` so deletions are tracked in git history; this preserves auditability of the v1→v2 transition. Per clean-slate decision in handoff.json key_findings 'No current users → migration tax is zero'.

criteria: `ls .fabric/` shows only events.jsonl + agents.meta.json + forensic.json (no rules/, no INITIAL_TAXONOMY.md, no bootstrap/)
`ls packages/cli/templates/bootstrap/` shows only CLAUDE.md + codex-AGENTS-header.md + cursor-fabric-bootstrap.mdc (3 supported-client templates remaining)
No `.fabric-v1-archive/` directory anywhere in repo (`find . -name .fabric-v1-archive -type d` returns empty)
`pnpm typecheck` passes (deleting templates does not break TS compile because templates are read at runtime via fs.readFile, not imported)
git status shows 6 deleted entries (3 .fabric/ + 3 templates/bootstrap/)

rationale.chosen_approach: Single git rm commit batching all 6 deletions
alternatives_considered: Move to .fabric-v1-archive/ (rejected per user clean-slate preference)
Keep templates dir for unsupported clients (rejected per MEMORY.md scope)
rationale.tradeoffs: Deletion is irrecoverable outside git; mitigated by single-commit grouping that makes revert trivial

success_metrics: All 6 paths gone from working tree
